overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character exploring a coastal military encampment at night. The scene features wooden fortifications, watchtowers with red banners, and torch-lit structures along a sandy beach with shallow water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal military encampment with wooden fortifications

events.description: armored character enters view from the right side and walks toward camera
character stops walking and stands still to observe surroundings

agents.ego_description: character walks along wooden platform approaching the camera position, surveying the coastal fort

entered.detail: tall wooden scaffolding structure with platform on top
woven wooden barrier fencing along the platform edge
tall vertical red flag on wooden pole
calm sea visible beyond the wooden docks
weathered wooden pier extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The video opens with a panoramic view of a coastal military camp at night, featuring wooden fortifications and red banners against a starry sky. An armored character enters from the right and approaches the camera, stopping to survey the torch-lit encampment and ocean beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: supply area under red canopy tent

events.description: character descends from wooden platform into shallow water
character climbs onto wooden platform and enters covered area with supply sacks

agents.ego_description: character stands still observing the camp, then moves through shallow water and approaches a covered supply area

notable_agents.action: distant guard standing near torch-lit structure

entered.detail: large red fabric canopy covering supply area
large woven baskets filled with grain or sand
warm orange flames illuminating distant wooden structures

segments.scene_description: The character pauses to observe the surroundings before descending into shallow water and climbing onto a platform beneath a red canopy. Supply sacks are stacked under the canopy while torchlight flickers from distant structures, and a guard stands watch in the far background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water with wooden watchtowers

events.description: character interacts with and picks up a tall red banner flag from the wooden platform
character begins wading through shallow water carrying the banner

agents.ego_description: character picks up a red banner and carries it while wading through shallow water along the coast

entered.detail: dark forested hillside rising behind the camp
large piles of sand or earth near the waterline

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered area and picks up a red banner flag, then proceeds to wade through the shallow coastal water. The camera follows as the character moves past sand mounds toward a wooden watchtower, with forested mountains visible in the dark background.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shallows with scattered wooden barricades

events.description: character stops and looks around while standing in shallow water near watchtower

agents.ego_description: character continues exploring the coastal area, wading through water and surveying the wooden fortifications while carrying the banner

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the shoreline

entered.detail: low wooden fences and walls scattered across the beach

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the shallow water, the character explores the expansive coastal camp while carrying the red banner. The camera pans across wooden barricades and watchtowers scattered along the shoreline, with distant torchlights and mountains framing the night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide panoramic view of a coastal military camp into a focused exploration of its waterfront fortifications. It begins with a sweeping look at wooden walls and red banners under a starry night sky, as an armored character enters from the right to survey the torch-lit encampment and the ocean beyond. As the character moves forward, the perspective shifts from the broad landscape to a closer descent into the shallow water of the shoreline. The scene then opens up to reveal a platform beneath a red canopy where supply sacks are stacked, while flickering torchlight and a distant guard define the depth of the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered enclosure out into an expansive, torch-lit coastal military encampment at night. It begins as the character exits a covered area to retrieve a red banner, immediately wading into the shallow coastal waters. As the character moves forward, the camera tracks past sandy mounds toward a wooden watchtower set against a backdrop of dark, forested mountains. The scene then opens up to reveal the full scale of the shoreline, panning across a series of wooden barricades and scattered fortifications. Finally, the perspective expands to encompass the wider camp, where distant torchlights flicker along the coast under the silhouette of the mountains.
